prompt: I have a LangChain agent that calls several tools. I want to track which tool calls are getting stuck. How do I add agent-heart?

assertions.name: includes_setup_steps
assertions.description: Mentions npm install, agent-heart init, and server start

assertions.name: provides_callback_handler
assertions.description: Provides a LangChain callback handler class or function

assertions.name: uses_lifecycle_model
assertions.description: References the lock/unlock lifecycle for tracking tool calls

assertions.name: mentions_stale_detection
assertions.description: Explains that stuck tools will be detected as stale

assertions.name: includes_usage_example
assertions.description: Shows how to attach the handler to a LangChain agent or chain
